# Level 7 — The Abyss Crossing
# New mechanic: NO solid ground floor at all. Every section is floating platforms.
# Falling = pit death and respawn. Platforms are 2-3 tiles wide (minimum footprint).
# Spikes on top of some platforms — you must land on the correct half of the platform.
# 3 enemies in a row on the mid-section — you must fight and dodge on a tiny platform.
# The only "rest" spots are 4-tile wide platforms. Everything else is 2-3 tiles.
# Vow Stone floats alone on the last platform with no margin for error.
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows
